description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image and caches the local Maven repository at .m2/repository. Define two stages, test and deploy, and set the variables MAVEN_CLI_OPTS to '--batch-mode --errors --fail-at-end --show-version -DinstallAtEnd=true -DdeployAtEnd=true' and MAVEN_OPTS to '-Dhttps.protocols=TLSv1.2 -Dmaven.repo.local=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.m2/repository -Dorg.slf4j.simpleLogger.log.org.apache.maven.cli.transfer.Slf4jMavenTransferListener=WARN -Dorg.slf4j.simpleLogger.showDateTime=true -Djava.awt.headless=true'. In the test stage add a verify:jdk8 job that runs on all branches except master and executes 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify'. In the deploy stage add a deploy:jdk8 job that runs only on the master branch, first checks for the presence of ci_settings.xml and prints an informative message if it is missing, then runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy -s ci_settings.xml'. No additional services, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
